title: Manufacturing Engineer - Amara Raja Batteries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Amara Raja Batteries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
